avyavasthita a.
1 Not conformable to law or practice, unacquainted with the law or custom.
2 Ill-regulated, fickle, unstable; avyavasthitacittasya prasādopi bhayaṃkaraḥ  Nīti. 9 
3 Not in due order, unmethodical.
